name: Zucchini Casserole
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces NY white sharp Cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook zucchini and chopped onion in salted water for 10 minutes; drain.
2. Combine Stove Top Stuffing crumbs, seasoning packet, and butter. Mix well.
3. Place half of the stuffing mixture in a 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Mix together sour cream, cream of chicken soup, and shredded cheese. Add zucchini and mix well.
5. Spoon the mixture over the stuffing in the pan.
6. Top with remaining stuffing mixture.
7. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
